name: Google Translate
description: Drop-in Google Translate gadget. Choose a vertical, horizontal, or simple inline layout.
author: MoribundInstitute

name: Pageview Stats
description: Blogger pageview counter with an optional sparkline. Toggle the sparkline and counter style, and set the time range.
author: MoribundInstitute

name: Wikipedia Search
description: A Wikipedia search box for your sidebar. Point it at any language or fandom wiki via the editable Wiki base URL.
author: MoribundInstitute
